goblin_page.title: Goblin Jr. Adventure
goblin_page.subtitle: A vibrant 3D platformer featuring stylized cubic worlds and a robust local leaderboard system.

about.title: A Small Hero in a Big World
desc: Join a brave little Goblin on a journey through floating islands to collect glittering treasures.
Goblin Jr. Adventure is a 3D platformer designed for casual players, built to explore the integration of classic arcade mechanics within Unreal Engine 5.
The project focuses on delivering a polished user experience, from fluid character movement to a complete game loop including persistence and rankings.

gameplay.title: Classic Platforming Fun
items: • Stylized Traversal: Precise jump mechanics designed for navigating floating cubic environments and avoiding ingenious traps.
• Treasure Hunt: Interactive chests and collectible coins scattered across the levels to encourage exploration.
• Checkpoints & Persistence: A reliable system that tracks player progress and collected loot across sessions.
• End Game Loop: Final scoring system with visual rewards (fireworks) and data cleanup for replayability.

tech.title: System Architecture (C++ & BP)
items: • Hybrid Framework: Core systems developed in C++ (SaveGame, Audio Mixers) and extended via Blueprints for rapid gameplay iteration.
• Local Leaderboard: A dedicated Top 5 ranking system that persists locally, allowing players to compete for high scores.
• Asynchronous Loading: Implementation of real-time loading screens featuring animated Flipbook to ensure smooth transitions.
• Audio Control: Comprehensive Audio Mixer setup for independent management of music, UI sounds, and environmental SFX.

systems.title: UX & Localization
items: • Advanced Options: Fully functional settings menu including axis inversion, volume controls, and window mode persistence.
• Multi-language Support: Integrated localization framework for English and Italian, switchable via the main menu.
• Input Scalability: Support for both Keyboard/Mouse and Gamepad controllers with dedicated UI feedback.
• VFX Integration: Use of Niagara and Flipbook plugins to enhance visual feedback during key gameplay moments.

architecture.title: C++ Software Architecture
architecture.desc: Modular project structure organized into specialized namespaces for high maintainability.
architecture.img1: Solution Overview: Clean organization of header and source files within the Unreal project structure.

hybrid.title: Hybrid Development Workflow
hybrid.desc: Usage of BlueprintImplementableEvent to trigger visual logic from C++ core classes.
hybrid.img1: C++/BP Integration: Example of a C++ class calling Blueprint events for cosmetic animations.

persistence.title: Save System & Serialization
persistence.desc: Implementation of a robust save system for gameplay progression and user preferences.
persistence.img1: Data Saving: Configuration of the SaveGame object used to persist coins and checkpoints.

input.title: Enhanced Input & Scalability
input.desc: Unified mapping for Keyboard, Gamepad, and Touch using UE5 Enhanced Input.
input.img1: Input Mapping: Cross-platform control scheme setup for universal accessibility.

instance.title: Game Instance & Global State
instance.desc: Centralized management of save file references and global states that persist across levels.
instance.img1: Global Logic: Implementation of the GameInstance class to handle persistent data between sessions.

ui.title: UI Hierarchy & UX Design
ui.desc: Menu system architecture built using Widget Blueprints and hierarchical navigation.
ui.img1: Widget Structure: Hierarchy of the pause and main menu widgets with focus on user flow.

cta.title: Ready for adventure?
cta.subtitle: Available for Windows on itch.io. Try to reach the Top 5!
